prompt: Create a dramatic cinematic fantasy portrait of Luna the black panther and a female knight: a large realistic black panther perched protectively across the shoulders of a tall female knight, its two front paws hanging down over her polished silver breastplate and pauldrons. The panther is the dominant subject, centered near the top, with glossy black fur, amber eyes, visible whiskers, rounded ears, an open mouth showing small fangs, and an alert noble expression. The knight has extremely long windblown platinum-blonde hair streaming across the left side of the frame, ornate reflective medieval plate armor with engraved filigree, layered shoulder guards, dark under-sleeves, and a decorative central chest ornament; place a flat opaque medium-brown square censor block over the knight’s face in the center of the image. Behind them, show a turbulent blue night sky with sparks and glowing particles, plus sweeping red fabric or banners curving diagonally through the background like a battle standard. Use intense rim lighting, warm firelight highlights, cool blue reflections in the armor, high contrast, shallow depth of field, hyper-realistic fur and metal textures, epic fantasy movie-poster composition, vertical 4:5 framing, no text, no watermark.
